title: Support Operations Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger support operations foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Support Operations Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Support Operations Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good support operations foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Support Operations Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
